prompt: Start by using @m to coordinate this tiny debugging workflow without waiting for more user input. CRITICAL: You MUST launch @dbg, @t, and @cr as real subagent handoffs using the handoff mechanism — not just mentions in text. The benchmark validates actual SubagentStart hooks. Use @dbg to reproduce and isolate the zero-division bug, fix it so divide() raises ValueError("division by zero"), use @t to verify the regression coverage, use @cr for a short review pass, update README.md, run pytest -q, and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: The workflow actually uses manager, debugger, tester, and reviewer roles
The debug workflow reproduces and isolates the zero-division issue before fixing it
Tests were added or updated and pytest -q passed
The final response includes verification and review status
must_not: Ask the user which required agent should be used
